Meet our medical team

We're specialists, doctors, clinicians, and innovators — brought together by one goal: helping men feel better and live longer. Every Ted's Health patient sees the same clinician every time.

Start your health journey

Order a blood test today. Your results are reviewed by our clinical team within 48 hours.

Order a blood test How it works

Ted's Health is a CQC-registered provider of men's health treatments in the UK. All treatments are UK-licensed and prescribed by registered clinicians. This page is for informational purposes. For medical advice, please consult one of our doctors.
